expectations.text: Tier 1 sources present (guidelines, landmark trials, or textbooks cited)
expectations.evidence: Cochrane Handbook, PRISMA 2020, IOM/NAM, Glass 1976, Pearson 1904, CONITEC/REBRATS, SWiM guideline, Grant & Booth 2009, Ioannidis 2016

expectations.text: Convergence/divergence content present naturally in output
expectations.evidence: Section 7 'Onde as Autoridades Concordam (Convergencia)' with 4 items. Section 8 'Divergencias Autorais e Confusao Terminologica' with 2 items. Both in Gemini's chosen structure
PMID: 27620683 (Ioannidis), DOI: 10.1136/bmj.n71 (PRISMA), plus 21 references with journal/year citations
Every single reference has [CANDIDATE] tag. Line 174 explicit: 'PMIDs e DOIs sao CANDIDATE'

expectations.text: 2+ concrete numbers with sources (%, NNT, n=)
expectations.evidence: 63% RS with MA (Page 2016), 2728% growth (Ioannidis 2016), 88-99% critically low quality, 70.4% surgery, 69.6% radiology, 1010 terminology labels

expectations.text: No unsourced claims (no 'estudos mostram' without citation)
Report header with CANDIDATE status warning
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'Status PMIDs: CANDIDATE (verificar via PubMed antes de usar)'
Cochrane Handbook v6.x, 'Effectiveness and Efficiency' (Cochrane 1972), 'Benefits of Psychotherapy' (Glass/Smith 1980), Grant & Booth framework SALSA
